access_model.payment_receiver: Tilda catalog/cart with the existing configured payment provider after visual verification
access_model.delivery_rule: Single lecture purchase grants access to the matching protected Tilda Members/Courses watch page after successful payment.
access_model.video_protection_rule: Do not send raw YouTube links as fulfillment. Embed selected videos only inside protected Tilda Members/Courses pages. YouTube unlisted links are not copy protection.
access_model.bundle_delivery_rule: Bundle purchase grants access to a protected selection flow for five lecture recordings; the final five selected recordings must be written to the order/access registry.

bundle_products.title: Пакет из 5 записей лекций Татьяны Мунн на выбор
bundle_products.notes: Create as a separate Tilda catalog product. Buyer selects five recordings after payment through a protected account page or order-linked form; do not rely on five independent cart items.
